yeast-risen-lantern-pie-argiro.name: Yeast-risen Lantern Pie

ingredients.item: A little olive oil for the bowl
Shaving an orange for the dough, (optional)
Some sesame for the baking pan, (optional)
A little olive oil for the bowl
Shaving an orange for the dough, (optional)
Some sesame for the baking pan, (optional)

instructions: In a bowl, add the flour, mastic, yeast, sugar, and a spoon.
In a jug, add the wine, water, oil and mix.
We puddle the solid materials and add the liquid materials.
Mix the dough with the spoon.
When it forms, we oil the hands and put it on the counter.
Bake for 5 minutes.
It'll stick slightly in the hands, but don't add any more flour. Must be wet.
Add a bowl of oil and add the dough and cover well.
Allow it to rise for 1 hour in a warm place.
Grab the dough with oily hands and deflate it on the counter.
We give her spherical shape and collect the compounds below.
We're making a 26 or 28 million baking pan.
Lay in anti-stick paper or sprinkle the pan with sesame.
We touch it on the pan and push it to spread.
Cover with wet towel and place it in a hot oven at 50oC to rise and swell for 30 minutes.
Preheat oven to 180oC in air.
Optionally brush with some sugar and water to polish in the baking.
Sprinkle with sesame.
Bake until browned around 30 minutes, without turning on the oven.
Let her stand on the baking pan for 15 minutes.
Disform and let it cool. Wrap it with membrane to keep it very fluffy and soft.
To serve if you want sprinkle with powder sugar.

yogurt-cherries-and-caramelized-oats-ste.name: Yogurt, Cherries And Caramelized Oats Step By Step
yogurt-cherries-and-caramelized-oats-ste.original_name: Yogur, cerezas y avena caramelizada paso a paso

ingredients.item: 60 grams of brown sugar (to caramelize oatmeal)

instructions: A frying pan with low heat adds oatmeal and 60 grams of brown sugar to caramelize.
It constantly removes till the sugar is ground and attached to the oatmeal. Reserve.
Wash the cherries well and cut them in half and remove the seed and stem.
In a separate pot, add water, cherries and 3 sugar spoons and let them cook at medium low heat for 10 minutes.
No dejes de remover para que no se queme. Deja enfriar.
Sirve las cerezas en un bol, seguidamente agrega el yogur y termina con la avena caramelizada. Disfruta.

yum-khai-dao-fried-egg-salad.name: Yum Khai Dao (fried Egg Salad)

ingredients.item: Chinese celery stalks or 1 large celery stalk
ingredients.prep: tender leaves reserved, stalks thinly sliced

ingredients.item: (lightly packed) cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions:
Whisk ¼ cup fresh lime juice, 2 Tbsp. fish sauce, 2 Tbsp. chopped cilantro, 2 Tbsp. finely grated garlic (8–12 cloves), 1 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. sugar, and 1 tsp. finely chopped red Thai chile (1–2 chiles) in a small bowl until sugar is dissolved. Taste dressing and season with salt if needed. Cover and chill until ready to use (you should have about ½ cup).
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

Pour vegetable oil into a large high-sided skillet to come about ¼" up sides (2–3 cups, depending on the size of your pan) and heat over high until hot. Crack 2 or 3 of 6 large eggs into pan one at a time, taking care to not let them touch, and fry, using a spatula to dislodge any egg that is sticking to the bottom, until whites are crisped and cooked through but yolks are still runny, 1–2 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer eggs to a large plate or baking sheet. Season with kosher salt and freshly ground white pepper. Repeat with remaining eggs. Once all eggs have been fried; set aside.

Gently toss 2 large Chinese celery stalks or 1 large celery stalk, tender leaves reserved, stalks thinly sliced, 2 medium shallots, thinly sliced, and 1 cup halved cherry tomatoes in a medium bowl to combine. Tear celery leaves if large (don’t use more than ⅓ cup) and add to bowl along with about half of reserved dressing. Toss until evenly coated. Taste salad and season with more salt if needed.

Spread half of remaining dressing over a platter in a thin layer. Arrange reserved fried eggs on top and spoon salad over. Drizzle remaining dressing on top, then scatter ¹⁄₃ cup (lightly packed) cilantro leaves with tender stems over and season with more white pepper.

yummy-pumpkin-cheesecake-bars.name: Yummy Pumpkin Cheesecake Bars
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Beat cake mix, 1 egg, butter, and 2 teaspoons pumpkin pie spice on low with an electric mixer in a large bowl until crumbly. Press mixture into the bottom of a 10x15-inch jelly roll pan.

Beat cream cheese in another bowl with an electric mixer until fluffy. Gradually beat in pumpkin puree, sweetened condensed milk, 2 eggs, 2 teaspoons pumpkin pie spice, and salt until smooth. Pour pumpkin mixture over cake mix crust and sprinkle with walnuts.
Bake in preheated oven until set, 30 to 35 minutes. Allow to cool to room temperature and refrigerate until chilled. Cut into bars.
